headline: Corporate Knights Honors Trane Technologies As One of the USA's Most Sustainable Corporations
summary: SWORDS, IE / ACCESS Newswire / March 11, 2026 / Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT), a global climate innovator, has been named to Corporate Knights' inaugural list of the USA's 25 Most Sustainable Corporations. The ranking recognizes the top‑performing ...
